$schema-note: Per-plugin sync-time hooks applied by scripts/sync-plugins.mjs. Kept here (not under .claude-plugin/) because that directory is reserved for official Claude Code plugin manifests, and `claude plugin validate` rejects unknown keys in marketplace.json.
